title: Can I send Update to Zapier based on Item conditions/names?
excerpt:
I want to send an Item update to Zaper (then off to ChatGPT for processing).   I know you can create a Trigger in Zapier for Item Update, but I don’t want a global trigger. 
I only want it to send the update to Zapier if…

posts.author: meddle01 (John Gray)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to send an Item update to Zaper (then off to ChatGPT for processing). I know you can create a Trigger in Zapier for Item Update, but I don’t want a global trigger.

I only want it to send the update to Zapier if a Monday Checkbox on that Item is also selected - or - some way to press a button to send the update. I want to do this selectively, on a per-Item basis.

Is this possible?

posts.author: kindertech (KinderTech)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @meddle01, this is most definitely possible. I am less familiar with Zapier, but have used it on occasion. I operate with make.com mainly. On Monday you can create a button that sends a webhook to zapier to start the scenario you have there in Zapier.

How we do it in Make.com (I’m presuming it will be similar in Zapier), is set up a webhook address within the scenario and then use that address in the Monday button.

image191×163 1.91 KB
image455×536 30.9 KB

Then set up the button to send a webhook when clicked. You will be able to use zapier from there to retrieve all the item information and such.

Feel free to reach out if you need any further help.
Nathan Kind (nathan@kinder-technologies.com)
Lead Software Consultant - Kinder Tech
